use_case_name: Inform CSMS of an Offline Occurred Transaction

structured.name: Inform CSMS of an Offline Occurred Transaction
structured.objective:
To enable the Charging Station to inform the CSMS that a transaction occurred while the
Charging Station was Offline.
structured.description:
This use case covers how the Charging Station starts and stops a transaction since connection
loss.
scenario: 1. The connection with the CSMS is restored.
2. The Charging Station sends a Heartbeat message to the CSMS.

3. The Charging Station sends TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Started, offline = TRUE) to
the CSMS.
4. The CSMS responds with TransactionEventResponse, accepting the transaction.
5. The Charging Station sends TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Updated, offline = TRUE)
7. The Charging Station sends TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended, offline = TRUE)
structured.prerequisites: At least one Offline transaction has taken place.
structured.postconditions:
Successful postcondition:
The CSMS has processed all transactions that occurred Offline.
Failure postcondition:
n/a

requirements.definition:
The Charging Station MUST queue all TransactionEventRequest
messages, that it would have sent to the CSMS if the Charging
Station had been online.

The Charging Station MUST send queued
TransactionEventRequest messages with the flag offline set to
TRUE.

requirements.precondition:
When configured to send meter data in the
TransactionEventRequest(eventType =
Updated), See: Meter Values - Configuration
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL add the configured measurands to
the optional meterValue field in the TransactionEventRequest
(eventType = Updated) sent to the CSMS to provide more details
during the transaction. (Same as J02.FR.11)

requirements.precondition:
E12.FR.03
AND
Offline
AND
The Charging Station is running low on memory
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station MAY drop TransactionEventRequest
(eventType = Updated) messages. (Same as J02.FR.12)

When dropping TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Updated)
messages, the Charging Station SHALL drop intermediate
messages first (2nd message, 4th message, 6th message etc.),
not start dropping messages from the start or stop adding
messages to the queue. (Same as J02.FR.13)

requirements.precondition:
E12.FR.03
AND
Amount of meter data is too much for 1
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Updated)
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station MAY split the meter data over multiple
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Updated) messages with
the same timestamp. (Same as J02.FR.14)

requirements.precondition:
When configured to send meter data in the
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Ended),
See: Meter Values - Configuration
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL add the configured measurands to
the optional meterValue field in the TransactionEventRequest
(eventType = Ended) sent to the CSMS to provide more details
about transaction usage. (Same as E08.FR.09)

requirements.precondition:
E12.FR.07
AND
The Charging Station is running low on memory
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station MAY drop meter data in the
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Ended) message. (Same
as E06.FR.12)

When dropping meter data, the Charging Station SHALL drop
intermediate values first (2nd value, 4th value, 6th etc), not drop
the start and end values from the list. (Same as E06.FR.13)

The Charging Station SHALL retrieve signed meter values and
put them in the signedMeterValue field of sampledValues. (Same
as E06.FR.14)

chunks.content:
# E12 - Inform CSMS of an Offline Occurred Transaction

**Objective:** To enable the Charging Station to inform the CSMS that a transaction occurred while the
Charging Station was Offline.

**Description:** This use case covers how the Charging Station starts and stops a transaction since connection
loss.

**Actors:** Charging Station, CSMS

**Scenario:**
1. The connection with the CSMS is restored.
2. The Charging Station sends a Heartbeat message to the CSMS.
3. The Charging Station sends TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Started, offline = TRUE) to
the CSMS.
4. The CSMS responds with TransactionEventResponse, accepting the transaction.
5. The Charging Station sends TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Updated, offline = TRUE)
6. The CSMS responds with TransactionEventResponse.
7. The Charging Station sends TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended, offline = TRUE)
8. The CSMS responds with TransactionEventResponse.

**Prerequisites:** At least one Offline transaction has taken place.

**Postconditions:** Successful postcondition:
The CSMS has processed all transactions that occurred Offline.
Failure postcondition:
n/a

metadata.heading: E12 - Inform CSMS of an Offline Occurred Transaction
metadata.use_case_name: Inform CSMS of an Offline Occurred Transaction

chunks.content:
# E12 - Requirements

**E12.FR.01**
Precondition: When Offline
The Charging Station MUST queue all TransactionEventRequest
messages, that it would have sent to the CSMS if the Charging
Station had been online.

**E12.FR.02**
Precondition: After the connection is restored.
The Charging Station MUST send queued
TransactionEventRequest messages with the flag offline set to
TRUE.

**E12.FR.03**
Precondition: When configured to send meter data in the
TransactionEventRequest(eventType =
Updated), See: Meter Values - Configuration
The Charging Station SHALL add the configured measurands to
the optional meterValue field in the TransactionEventRequest
(eventType = Updated) sent to the CSMS to provide more details
during the transaction. (Same as J02.FR.11)

**E12.FR.04**
Precondition: E12.FR.03
AND
Offline
AND
The Charging Station is running low on memory
The Charging Station MAY drop TransactionEventRequest
(eventType = Updated) messages. (Same as J02.FR.12)

**E12.FR.05**
Precondition: E12.FR.04
When dropping TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Updated)
messages, the Charging Station SHALL drop intermediate
messages first (2nd message, 4th message, 6th message etc.),
not start dropping messages from the start or stop adding
messages to the queue. (Same as J02.FR.13)

**E12.FR.06**
Precondition: E12.FR.03
AND
Amount of meter data is too much for 1
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Updated)
The Charging Station MAY split the meter data over multiple
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Updated) messages with
the same timestamp. (Same as J02.FR.14)

**E12.FR.07**
Precondition: When configured to send meter data in the
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Ended),
See: Meter Values - Configuration
The Charging Station SHALL add the configured measurands to
the optional meterValue field in the TransactionEventRequest
(eventType = Ended) sent to the CSMS to provide more details
about transaction usage. (Same as E08.FR.09)

**E12.FR.08**
Precondition: E12.FR.07
AND
The Charging Station is running low on memory
The Charging Station MAY drop meter data in the
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Ended) message. (Same
as E06.FR.12)

**E12.FR.09**
Precondition: E12.FR.08
When dropping meter data, the Charging Station SHALL drop
intermediate values first (2nd value, 4th value, 6th etc), not drop
the start and end values from the list. (Same as E06.FR.13)

**E12.FR.10**
Precondition: SampledDataSignReadings is true
The Charging Station SHALL retrieve signed meter values and
put them in the signedMeterValue field of sampledValues. (Same
as E06.FR.14)

metadata.heading: E12 - Requirements
metadata.use_case_name: Inform CSMS of an Offline Occurred Transaction
